summary: NH-48 service lane contractor has not mobilized equipment since November. Bond forfeiture proceedings recommended.
East Delhi water supply augmentation project is 40% complete. Pipeline procurement delayed due to vendor dispute.
Yamuna floodplain encroachment removal has not commenced. Inter-departmental coordination pending with Revenue and DDA.
Pension digitization pilot in Shahdara district shows 62% Aadhaar-bank linkage. Remaining beneficiaries require manual verification.
Narela sewer rehabilitation tender was floated but received only 1 bid due to difficult terrain. Re-tendering recommended with revised scope.
Fleet allocation review shows 14 buses available for Najafgarh route augmentation but driver shortage (18 vacancies) is blocking deployment.
South Delhi drain desilting programme is 55% complete. Mehrauli drain requires heavy machinery not currently available in the zone's equipment pool.
